programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Aux avant-postes
programme.desc: Dans un monde en pleine mutation, Ali Laïdi décrypte, avec ses invités, les enjeux cachés des conflits économiques, géopolitiques et culturels, afin d'en comprendre les dynamiques profondes.

programme.title: L'info du jour[Live]
programme.desc: Un éclairage sur un événement marquant de l'actualité du jour, sélectionné pour sa portée et ses implications. Décrypté avec du recul, il permet de comprendre les enjeux sous-jacents, les conséquences possibles et les dynamiques qui façonnent le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Au coeur de l'info : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Une immersion au cœur de l'information pour analyser les faits marquants du jour et en comprendre les implications. L'émission propose également des éclairages sur les grands enjeux internationaux, afin d'offrir une lecture claire et approfondie de l'actualité mondiale.

programme.title: Le journal de l'Afrique
programme.desc: Direction l'Afrique pour un rendez-vous quotidien afin de suivre l'actualité du continent africain, avec des correspondants et des invités en plateau.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Phoenix Financial Daily Report
programme.desc: Phoenix Financial Daily Report : Aims to help audience figure out the financial clues from a choice selection of the hottest news of the day. The show also links up with experts from related fields to offer their profound insights. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.desc: When manga artist Kentaro Miura passed away suddenly, he left behind his masterpiece, Berserk. Shermin - a fan of Berserk - decides to find out more about Miura and his legacy as a manga artist.

programme.title: Hasankeyf - The Town That Drove Away
programme.desc: The construction of the Ilisu Dam in Turkey flooded priceless cultural monuments. These included the city of Hasankeyf, in the south-east of the country. The last inhabitants had to watch as their centuries-old culture disappeared.

programme.title: E4 - Gareth Southgate
programme.desc: In Bear’s Mission with Gareth Southgate, the leader of the Three Lions squad will swap the football field for some of the UK’s toughest terrain and tackle the ultimate challenge, as he joins Bear on a mission across the wilds of Dartmoor.

programme.title: E6 - Lima
programme.desc: Lima is known as the Garden City, but driving here definitely isn't a walk in the park.

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam
programme.desc: Off to Vietnam next, Rooftop and Catfish embark on what may be their most dangerous visit yet. The BMX bikers start their journey relatively tame with a shot of snake blood. However, things quickly escalate from there with the most intense game of frogger they’ve ever played in the Vietnamese streets. From a hospital visit and racing through the Vietcong tunnels to trying fertilized baby bird eggs and relaxing in a boiling hot spring, nothing can prepare the duo for the ending of their trip heading to the demilitarized zone to detonate bombs. After this trip to Vietnam, what more heart-racing adventures and Rooftop and Catfish possibly find?

programme.title: E4 - Green Iguanas
programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. Free to roam the canals, parks, and suburban neighborhoods, these pets-gone-feral have exploded in both size and population, causing hundreds of millions of dollars of damage a year in Florida. Urban hunter Michael Onega is doing his part to clean up the environment by removing as many iguanas as possible, limiting their population spread. The singular goal - to make sure the iguanas never establish a healthy breeding population in the Everglades. Yia joins Michael and his trusty Labrador Scout on Michael's mud boat, as they patrol the canals in Michael's backyard. The only thing better than Scout retrieving the fallen iguanas, are BBQed iguana and iguana tacos cooked up in Michael's backyard.

programme.title: E218 - Bring It On
programme.desc: Trying out for the cheerleading squad, Lay Lay and Sadie add their own twists to the routine, but learn that standing out doesn't always work when trying to fit into a team.

programme.title: E206 - Prison Break / Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: E253 - Jolly Lodgers / Biddy Sitting
programme.desc: Squidward packs his bags after his house gets infested, but a different kind of pest waits at his hotel. // SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: E276 - Say 'Awww!'/ Patrick the Mailman
programme.desc: Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says 'aww!' // Patrick crushes the mailman, so he and SpongeBob deliver the mail around Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: E310 - Biscuit Ballyhoo / Student Driver Survivor
programme.desc: After the Science Scouts begin selling biscuits to fund a trip to Mars, Mr. Krabs joins the ring and turns it into a competition. // When a competitor threatens to shut down Mrs. Puff's boating school, she must rely on SpongeBob to stay in business.

programme.title: E102 - Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E809 - Bulking and Sulking / Wild Goss Chase
programme.desc: Dad struggles to run Lynn's Table when his brother Lance opens up a gym above the restaurant. // Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: E536 - Escape Room
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man are tricked into entering an escape room by a factory owner with a 'chip' on his shoulder. They are trapped inside with two new kids, Mika and Miles, who are oddly good at solving the puzzles they need to answer to get out.

programme.title: E202 - Mutantweight Title Bout
programme.desc: All of Raph's dreams have come true as he fights Rocksteady, Bebop, and Mondo Gecko in the underground Mutant Battle Arena. But he doesn't realize he's walked right into a trap set by Kitsune and her street gang, the Purple Dragons!

programme.title: E118 - That's So Cupid / Buddy Odour
programme.desc: Inspired by the latest Romcom release at the Movie Theatre, Best and Bester decide to go on a match-making mission. // Toot moves into the Sub with Best and Bester, but they find there's no getting away from her smell - literally!

programme.title: E292 - SquidBird / Allergy Attack!
programme.desc: Squidward gets left with a mess when SpongeBob and Patrick use carrier clams to send messages to each other. // After cooking his kazillionth Krabby Patty, SpongeBob believes he's developed an allergy to them.

programme.title: E203 - Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: E253 - Jolly Lodgers / Biddy Sitting
programme.desc: Squidward packs his bags after his house gets infested, but a different kind of pest waits at his hotel. // SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: E108 - Mar-Smoothie-Lami
programme.desc: The Twins manage the Smoothie Bar and the Marsups end up creating the best smoothie ever.

programme.title: E316 - Sitting Bull / The Spies Who Love Me
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club but she quickly proves to be too aggressive. // Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown. But her grandparents think it's too dangerous, so they decide to spy on her.

programme.title: E207 - Endless Summer
programme.desc: Max pretends to turn evil to infiltrate Mastermind's henchmen and steal the Chip-Chucker, a device that previously turned him evil.

programme.title: E219 - I Know Your Secret
programme.desc: Henry gets a series of mysterious notes from someone and worries that this person may know his secret identity.

programme.title: E104 - Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.desc: The power of an immortal. The soul of a human. The heart of a hero. Wesley Snipes is Blade, the vampire slayer!

programme.title: E1 - The Birth Of Mickey
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: E4 - Mad Medicine
programme.desc: Ever taken medical advice from a cigarette commercial? There was a time when any and all 'cures' could be sold to the public indiscriminately.

programme.title: E3 - Barbarossa
programme.desc: Operation Barbarossa, Nazi Germany's surprise invasion of the Soviet Union, launches on June 22, 1941. In what is the largest military operation in history, Hitler aims to capture their economic resources.

programme.title: E4 - Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Japan escalates its war in China, drawing increasing US sanctions. Driven by resource shortages and military ideology, Japan attacks Pearl Harbor in a move that will reshape the course of World War II.

programme.title: E3 - Into The Magnetic Storm
programme.desc: The team seeks out the wreck of the Revonoc, a racing yacht that vanished in 1958 with a crew of five. A freak magnetic anomaly was detected in the Triangle when she went missing.

E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E5 - Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Join Cody and Nina for a day of friendly competition! Imagine playing in the World Cup, race as the tortoise and the hare, and challenge the parents to a soccer match. Learn that being fast isn't always what makes you a winner!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

E15 - Good Mitch Spiking/Stilt Walkers
programme.desc: Muscle Man reveals his secret past.

programme.title: E1 - A. Legendary Sandwich/Pie Bros
programme.desc: The team goes on a series of epic quests in order to create the world's perfect sandwich.

programme.title: E6 - Free Cake/Party Pete/Stick Hockey/Payback/Party Bus/Wall Buddy
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby try to seize an opportunity to eat a piece of cake, and it comes when they learn that Skips' birthday is coming soon.

programme.title: E6 - A. Belly Achin'/Dog Daze/Birds of a Feather/Vampire Mouse/Entering and Breaking
programme.desc: Quacker enlists Jerry's help to fix his favorite birdbath that has cracked, but the two get sidetracked by the scent of Tom's delicious Chinese takeout.

programme.title: E19 - Panda's Sneeze/Brother Up
programme.desc: Panda bears have a very adorable (and violent!) sneeze, and our Panda is no exception. When a Vine video of his lovable sneeze goes viral, Panda becomes a 'cute' sensation, which causes Nom Nom to try to fend off of this new challenger to his throne.

programme.title: E23 - Board Game Empire
programme.desc: Amato and friends find a mysterious board game which transports them into its world, and the only way out is to win.

programme.desc: Sophie meets a horticulturalist in her Mediterranean-style garden in the Barossa Valley, Millie visits a creative couple in their country garden, Josh learns about growing plants in space, and we meet a devotee of lyrebirds.

programme.title: E1 - Sweeping Shores
programme.desc: The African intertidal zone is home to a unique universe of plants and creatures. Here, life has adapted to survive in a challenging marine environment - some species are able to live on exposed rocks, while others prefer the shelter of rock pools.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E4 - Finding a Family
programme.desc: Mona, a female cotton top tamarin is all alone in her tropical forest home. She has left the security of her birth family to search for an unrelated troop which might provide her with a future mate.

programme.title: E1 - Sweeping Shores
programme.desc: The African intertidal zone is home to a unique universe of plants and creatures. Here, life has adapted to survive in a challenging marine environment - some species are able to live on exposed rocks, while others prefer the shelter of rock pools.

programme.title: E1 - Smell
programme.desc: The first sense to evolve in the first animals was chemoreception: being able to detect chemicals in the animal’s environment. This helps animals find prey and mates, and to sense predators from a distance.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E4 - Finding a Family
programme.desc: Mona, a female cotton top tamarin is all alone in her tropical forest home. She has left the security of her birth family to search for an unrelated troop which might provide her with a future mate.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: E1 - January-February - the Year Begins
programme.desc: In the early months of the year, the Earth’s axial tilt brings the height of summer in some places and the depths of winter in others. See how life struggles to survive under these extreme conditions.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E2 - Summer
programme.desc: Summer brings long, warm days for wildlife to thrive. Watch animals learn new skills, compete for mates, and escape predators as they try to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: E2 - Sanctuary of the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: On Africa's east coast, the warm Agulhas run south with a distinctive subtropical landscape. Made up of everything from mangrove swamps to colorful coral reefs, the area has marine turtles - who breed on long and warm sandy beaches - and a recently found population of 'living fossils', the Coelacanth, which dwell in deep, submarine canyons.

programme.title: E3 - Warriors of the Llanos
programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.title: E4 - Finding a Family
programme.desc: Mona, a female cotton top tamarin is all alone in her tropical forest home. She has left the security of her birth family to search for an unrelated troop which might provide her with a future mate.

programme.title: E1 - Welcome to the Tundra
programme.desc: Wake up post-hibernation with 7 ravenous bears as Stage 1 of the competition kicks off. Battle wolves with new mom BoldFace, see tiny Stomper vie for power and Blondie’s love, and stand back as grizzled vet Bernie brawls with clueless teen Casanova.

programme.desc: The African intertidal zone is home to a unique universe of plants and creatures. Here, life has adapted to survive in a challenging marine environment - some species are able to live on exposed rocks, while others prefer the shelter of rock pools.

programme.title: E2 - Sanctuary of the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: On Africa's east coast, the warm Agulhas run south with a distinctive subtropical landscape. Made up of everything from mangrove swamps to colorful coral reefs, the area has marine turtles - who breed on long and warm sandy beaches - and a recently found population of 'living fossils', the Coelacanth, which dwell in deep, submarine canyons.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: E13 - Food Scientists
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tests the molecular gastronomy skills of four food scientist chefs in a series of games.

programme.title: E6 - Bring Home The Bacon
programme.desc: Home cook and pharmacist Jose is stunned when Eddie Jackson reveals his big audition is a competition! She goes head-to-head with chef Kelsey Barnard Clark.

programme.title: E3 - Easy Entertaining
programme.desc: Franco Noriega makes fresh bruschetta, easy risotto, tangy chicken and a fruity salad for a quick weeknight meal that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro reveals the secrets behind cookout favorites.

programme.desc: Aarthi Sampath seeks revenge against Carlos Anthony, and Tajahi Cooke confronts his former protege Daniel Westfall in head-to-head cooking battles.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E107
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E16 - The Soul Of The Beaufortain
programme.desc: In the northwest of Savoie, the village of Beaufort gave its name to the famous cheese of the same name. These magnificent green alpine pastures, ideal for livestock farming, are also a true land of champions. Marie Bochet, daughter of alpine farmers and a para-alpine skier with multiple medals, is one of the best ambassadors of her native massif.

programme.title: E11 - She Who Paints
programme.desc: Danielle Jacqui has been painting for fifty years; everything and everywhere, from floor to ceiling, in her house in the south of France. Portrait of an artist who is nothing if not unique.

programme.desc: Coming up: a visit to the province of Gipuzkoa in the Basque Country; a focus on the wildlife care center in Ustaritz; a meeting with the Ur Yoko rowing club in Saint-Jean-de-Luz.

programme.title: E756
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: The program is intended to promote exchanges between Korea and ASEAN countries by utilizing popular music.

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: E10 - The Very Best In Design
programme.desc: In Boulogne-Billancourt, visit the Musee des Annees 30. Stefania Di Petrillo explores the emotional dimensions of design. The organic forms of an omnipresent nature are embodied in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goleo.

programme.title: Madalena
programme.desc: Early spring in the city of Macau. Mada (Louis Cheung), a divorced man in his 40's, is the strong and silent type. He lives in a dilapidated flat that's set for demolition. Suffering from a serious case of amnesia, Mada works the graveyard shift as a taxi driver to overcome the pain of his affliction. One night, Mada picks up Lena (Chrissie Chau), who works as a restaurant receptionist by day and a bar hostess by night. After a misunderstanding sparks spark their friendship, Mada becomes Lena's driver, picking her up before and after work. Lena's arrival finally brings some color into Mada's life; he even begins to think that he can finally move on from his divorce. Yet, Lena feels lonely in Macau; she's disliked by her colleagues, who all think that she is a ruthless, money-grubbing hustler for using her voluptuous figure to get special treatment. Lena knows Mada's feelings for her, but she, too, is hiding a past that she can't get over...

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

E1
programme.desc: Dr. Noyonika's quiet life with her daughter, Ujjayani, takes a chaotic turn when she meets young pop star Ishaan. Now, she must choose between societal judgment and a rare second chance.

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: Aparajita, a talented artist haunted by her past, crosses paths with Rakshit, a reserved businessman. Though he avoids romance, their unexpected connection might just lead to true love.

programme.title: E811
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E5181
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E9 - 塞外東巡 (下)
programme.desc: 中的名場面，用現代方式表達其中蘊藏的經典文化與精神內涵，彰顯中華文明突出特性。邀請陳銘、喻恩泰、楊迪、王子異組成「萬卷遊學團」，羅一舟、張凌赫、張曉龍、王耀慶、王鶴棣、曾可妮作為「風雅體驗官」，分別體驗五場穿越千年的古今同游，根據遊學攻略不斷加載知識技能，最終完成「傳世名作名場面」的融創秀。

programme.title: E9 - 一次性打卡6大非遺項目
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E40 - 霸氣小神童機智答題 (完)
programme.desc: 《一站到底》升級進入競速時代，答題拼速度，輸贏靠積分! 選手對決人數由10人變為8人，首度開啟搶答模式，除站位獎外再增豐富答題連擊獎，連續守擂三期的選手更有機會獲得高薪工作機會。

programme.title: E9 - 塞外東巡 (下)
programme.desc: 中的名場面，用現代方式表達其中蘊藏的經典文化與精神內涵，彰顯中華文明突出特性。邀請陳銘、喻恩泰、楊迪、王子異組成「萬卷遊學團」，羅一舟、張凌赫、張曉龍、王耀慶、王鶴棣、曾可妮作為「風雅體驗官」，分別體驗五場穿越千年的古今同游，根據遊學攻略不斷加載知識技能，最終完成「傳世名作名場面」的融創秀。
